core_mechanism: variational energy-minimization over probability measures with a pairwise logarithmic (2D Coulomb) repulsion plus a confining external potential, whose minimizing equilibrium distribution occupies a region with an analytically determined free boundary
brief_reason: The method rests on solving 'the equilibrium measure of the corresponding weighted energy problem'—minimizing a logarithmic-energy functional under an external weight—whose minimizer is supported on quadrature domains whose bounding curve is fixed (via a Schwarz function) by the perturbing potential.
